input.background: Identify which of these statements are true and which are false.
input.question: The value of 6 changes when the units of measure are changed.

value_of_6.description: The numerical value being analyzed to determine how it changes with different units of measure.

units_of_measure.value: Different units of measurement (not explicitly provided in the question)
units_of_measure.description: The units of measurement that influence the interpretation or representation of the value of 6.
